revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{Template:各世紀の建築}} {{Commonscat|17th-century architecture|17th-century architecture}} [[17世紀]]の[[建築]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{…」
空調・生活の快適性などが含まれ芸術作品ではありますが、「美術工芸品」ではないです。
Moved [[Category:17th-century works]] to Buildings subcat
1 revision imported
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Commons category}} {{Navseasoncats}}
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Architecture by century]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:17th century in the arts|Architecture]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:2nd-millennium architecture]] [[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:17th century in art|Architecture]] [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:17世紀の建築]] [[ab:Category:17-тәи ашәышықәсазтәи архитектура]] [[ar:Category:عمارة القرن 17]] [[az:Category:XVII əsr memarlığı]] [[be:Category:Архітэктура XVII стагоддзя]] [[bn:Category:১৭শ শতাব্দীর স্থাপত্য]] [[bs:Category:Arhitektura u 17. vijeku]] [[commons:Category:17th-century architecture]] [[de:Category:Erbaut im 17. Jahrhundert]] [[eo:Category:Arkitekturo de la 17-a jarcento]] [[es:Category:Arquitectura del siglo XVII]] [[eu:Category:XVII. mendeko arkitektura]] [[fa:Category:معماری سده ۱۷ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Architecture au XVIIe siècle]] [[gl:Category:Arquitectura do século XVII]] [[hy:Category:17-րդ դարի ճարտարապետություն]] [[id:Category:Arsitektur abad ke-17]] [[ka:Category:XVII საუკუნის არქიტექტურა]] [[ko:Category:17세기 건축]] [[mk:Category:Архитектура од 17 век]] [[mn:Category:17-р зуунд барьсан]] [[nl:Category:17e-eeuwse architectuur]] [[no:Category:Arkitektur på 1600-tallet]] [[pt:Category:Arquitetura do século XVII]] [[ro:Category:Arhitectură în secolul al XVII-lea]] [[ru:Category:Архитектура XVII века]] [[sk:Category:Architektúra v 17. storočí]] [[sl:Category:Arhitektura v 17. stoletju]] [[sv:Category:Arkitektur under 1600-talet]] [[th:Category:สิ่งก่อสร้างในคริสต์ศตวรรษที่ 17]] [[tr:Category:17. yüzyılda mimarlık]] [[uk:Category:Архітектура XVII століття]] [[ur:Category:سترہویں صدی کی معماری]] [[zh:Category:17世纪建筑]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:Edo_period_architecture]].

revision.comment: Bot: log revisions ≥ 2025-05-13 with full text
revision.text:

Jahrhundert]] [[eo:Category:Arkitekturo de la 17-a jarcento]] [[es:Category:Arquitectura del siglo XVII]] [[eu:Category:XVII. mendeko arkitektura]] [[fa:Category:معماری سده ۱۷ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Architecture au XVIIe siècle]] [[gl:Category:Arquitectura do século XVII]] [[hy:Category:17-րդ դարի ճարտարապետություն]] [[id:Category:Arsitektur abad ke-17]] [[ka:Category:XVII საუკუნის არქიტექტურა]] [[ko:Category:17세기 건축]] [[mk:Category:Архитектура од 17 век]] [[mn:Category:17-р зуунд барьсан]] [[nl:Category:17e-eeuwse architectuur]] [[no:Category:Arkitektur på 1600-tallet]] [[pt:Category:Arquitetura do século XVII]] [[ro:Category:Arhitectură în secolul al XVII-lea]] [[ru:Category:Архитектура XVII века]] [[sk:Category:Architektúra v 17. storočí]] [[sl:Category:Arhitektura v 17. stoletju]] [[sv:Category:Arkitektur under 1600-talet]] [[th:Category:สิ่งก่อสร้างในคริสต์ศตวรรษที่ 17]] [[tr:Category:17. yüzyılda mimarlık]] [[uk:Category:Архітектура XVII століття]] [[ur:Category:سترہویں صدی کی معماری]] [[zh:Category:17世纪建筑]]

Jahrhundert]] [[eo:Category:Arkitekturo de la 17-a jarcento]] [[es:Category:Arquitectura del siglo XVII]] [[eu:Category:XVII. mendeko arkitektura]] [[fa:Category:معماری سده ۱۷ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:Architecture au XVIIe siècle]] [[gl:Category:Arquitectura do século XVII]] [[hy:Category:17-րդ դարի ճարտարապետություն]] [[id:Category:Arsitektur abad ke-17]] [[ka:Category:XVII საუკუნის არქიტექტურა]] [[ko:Category:17세기 건축]] [[mk:Category:Архитектура од 17 век]] [[mn:Category:17-р зуунд барьсан]] [[nl:Category:17e-eeuwse architectuur]] [[no:Category:Arkitektur på 1600-tallet]] [[pt:Category:Arquitetura do século XVII]] [[ro:Category:Arhitectură în secolul al XVII-lea]] [[ru:Category:Архитектура XVII века]] [[sk:Category:Architektúra v 17. storočí]] [[sl:Category:Arhitektura v 17. stoletju]] [[sv:Category:Arkitektur under 1600-talet]] [[th:Category:สิ่งก่อสร้างในคริสต์ศตวรรษที่ 17]] [[tr:Category:17. yüzyılda mimarlık]] [[uk:Category:Архітектура XVII століття]] [[ur:Category:سترہویں صدی کی معماری]] [[zh:Category:17世纪建筑]] [[en:Category:17th-century architecture]] [[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Categories with Japanese origin and translated names
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Jawiki pages with translated titles
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to " "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "Z==↵" to "Zo== [[Category:Floating Z headings[["
Text replacement - "[[Category:Floating Z headings[[" to "[[Category:Floating Z headings]][["
Bot: overwrite with content from en‑wiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]] [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:"

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8106802)
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|" to "[[Category:qq|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=17th-century_architecture here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
